title: * Addressing conflicts from [P3-A].
content:
* Addressing conflicts from [P3-A].
* Implementing fixes from the audit [P4-C].
* Triaging existing issues [P1-A].
* Cost & Resource Analysis [P4-E]:
* Provide an estimated time, compute, and token/API cost for executing the entire task list in Phase 5.
➡️ Human Review Gate 2 (HRG-2): Swarm Approval [HRG-2]
* STOP EXECUTION.
* Present the Project board [P4-D] and the Cost Analysis [P4-E].
* Request: "Do you approve the execution of these [X] tasks with an estimated cost of [Y]? [Yes/No/Modify Task List]"
* Proceed only upon "Yes."
Phase 5: Agentic Swarm Execution [P5]
* Specialized Agent Deployment [P5-A]:
* Assign tasks to a specialized swarm.
* Roles: @Gemini-Arbiter (Manages task flow, resolves conflicts), @TestWriterAgent (Fixes/writes tests), @RefactorAgent (Code implementation), @SecurityAgent (Audits PRs), @DocWriterAgent (Updates documentation).
* Orchestration & Arbitration [P5-B]:
* Execute tasks using the "critique-and-refine" loop.
* Arbitration Rule: The @Gemini-Arbiter has final say. If @RefactorAgent and @SecurityAgent disagree, the @Gemini-Arbiter makes the final decision.
